name: Klarna Kosma
description: Open banking API platform from Klarna connecting 15,000+ banks across 26 countries.

seo.title: Klarna Kosma — Data Integration / ETL / Reverse ETL
seo.meta_description: Klarna Kosma: Open banking API platform from Klarna connecting 15,000+ banks across 26 countries.

when_to_use: Open banking API connecting 15,000+ banks across 26 countries
PSD2-compliant account data access for European fintechs
Payment initiation across European banks in a single integration
Account verification and balance checks for lending apps
Open finance connectivity underpinning Klarna's banking features

pros: PSD2 and open banking compliance baked in
Backed by Klarna's fintech scale and resources
cons: Klarna brand tied to commercial priorities
Competes with Tink and TrueLayer in core markets
review.verdict: Credible EU open banking API with Klarna scale, though Tink and TrueLayer are battle-tested rivals.
review.best_for: European fintechs needing broad bank coverage and PSD2 compliance
review.not_for: Non-European companies or small teams wanting self-serve pricing
